title: If you don’t run Pi locally you’re falling behind…
summary: David Ondrej argues that running Pi locally is essential for not falling behind. The video promotes Pi agent development with accompanying educational courses and hiring for Scale Software.
writeup: This course covers Pi Agent, a framework for building real coding agents, with the stated goal of teaching the fundamentals in 30 minutes. It matters for developers moving from chat-based assistants to agentic coding workflows, where AI agents and multi-agent systems carry out tasks rather than only generating text. The takeaway is a compressed introduction to Pi Agent's core building blocks and how they apply to coding agents.
